hero.title: Hi, I'm Gustavo.
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience.
hero.description: I design and implement scalable systems across financial and e-commerce domains, with a strong focus on automation, cloud-native architecture, and CI/CD.

about.title: A bit about me
about.description: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in the Node.js ecosystem (Express, NestJS, Fastify) and React / Next.js, specializing in Cloud-Native architectures (Azure/AWS) and CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions.

cards.title: Architecture & migrations
cards.desc: Led the migration of an EJS-based monolith into a decoupled NestJS + React architecture with Docker containerization to improve maintainability and scalability.

cards.title: Automation & efficiency
cards.desc: Automated workflows and data collection, achieving up to 100% reduction in manual effort and 60% gains in operational efficiency.

cards.title: Data-driven delivery
cards.desc: Built SQL-driven dashboards and real-time metrics to support data-driven decision making for e-commerce and financial use cases.

projects.title: Some things I've built
projects.description: A few selected projects from my recent work.

items.title: USA Stock Market
items.description: Project to monitor U.S. stock market assets and generate automated emails with financial news from the Finnhub.io API, using Inngest for workflows and Gemini for AI-generated email content.

items.title: Sports Socket
items.description: Node.js API focused on real-time sports match updates using WebSockets as the main event channel and REST where synchronous request/response makes sense (bootstrap, listing, and creating matches).

items.title: AI Resume Analyzer
items.description: Application that analyzes resumes against specific job descriptions, evaluating compatibility and ATS alignment, with a 0–100 score and improvement suggestions.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: AI agent that answers questions based on data stored in a vector database: it transcribes audio, splits it into chunks, generates embeddings per chunk, stores them with a classId, and retrieves the most relevant context to answer questions about a specific lesson or recorded class.

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.description: If you have a role or project, reach out.

page.title: Experience
page.description: Timeline similar to LinkedIn. Edit the entries to match your journey.

items.summary: Developed and optimized automation bots, architected event-driven workflows consuming GraphQL APIs, integrated Python microservices to reconcile data across MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.
highlights: Developed and optimized automation bots using Node.js and Playwright, eliminating 100% of manual web data collection effort.
Architected event-driven workflows consuming GraphQL APIs to trigger core business processes in real-time.
Integrated Python microservices and DAGs to reconcile data between MongoDB and PostgreSQL, ensuring full system consistency.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for code validation and continuous deployment, structuring Pull Request workflows with mandatory reviews and quality control.
Leveraged GitHub Copilot as a productivity tool for development and code review processes.

items.summary: Led the migration of an EJS-based monolith to a cloud-ready architecture using NestJS and React with Docker containerization, built SQL-based dashboards with real-time product metrics, and designed REST APIs including recurring billing and critical event monitoring.
highlights: Led the migration of an EJS based monolith to a cloud-ready architecture using NestJS and React with Docker containerization, streamlining deployment and increasing horizontal scalability.
Structured SQL based analytical dashboards with real time product metrics, enabling data-driven financial insights and improved decision making.
Designed and optimized REST APIs and a subscription management system with recurring billing, including real-time monitoring of critical events.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with automated testing (Jest), increasing release reliability and reducing deployment time.
Operated in a fast-paced startup environment using Agile/Scrum methodologies, promoting continuous delivery and rapid adaptation to product evolution.

items.summary: Developed a financial risk analysis platform using Node.js, Fastify, and TypeScript with React dashboards, automated data collection and integrations with financial APIs, built scalable APIs with MongoDB, and structured cloud-native infrastructure on Azure with Docker and AKS.
highlights: Developed a financial risk analysis platform for receivables purchasing using Node.js, Fastify, and TypeScript, with React dashboards for real-time critical metrics visualization.
Reduced manual data collection effort by 60% through the implementation of event-driven automations and integrations with external financial APIs for risk calculation.
Engineered and implemented scalable APIs integrated with MongoDB, ensuring high performance and consistency in processing high volumes of customer data.
Structured cloud-native infrastructure on Azure, utilizing Docker for containerization and AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service) for orchestration, ensuring horizontal scalability and high availability.
Optimized external data ingestion following modern architecture principles, significantly increasing the operational agility of risk analysts.
